description:
🕒 15:00–17:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-kankokyoukai/

The bottom-open floats (したぬけ屋台) featured on a TV information show are a signature of Hanno's summer festival. Hanno's "Bottom-Open Float Tradition" is designated as an intangible folk cultural property of the city. Join locals in the procession and see all eight towns' bottom-open floats gather at the float-meeting (引き合わせ) event. Enjoy the festival with fun commentary from a festival expert and a special Yumema (飯能のイメージキャラクター) keychain—a tour the whole family can enjoy!

【Fee】¥3,000 per person; ¥2,000 for elementary school children and under (includes guide fee, insurance, light refreshments, and gratuities)

【Capacity】10 people

【Guide】Shigekazu Otsuki (Tsuguni Shinwaka-kai), staff of Oku-Musashi Hanno Tourism Association; Cooperation: Ni-chome Town Association

【What to bring】Drinking water, sweat towel
location: 集合 飯能小町公園（西武池袋線「飯能駅」下車徒歩10分）
summary: 🎉 Hanno Summer Festival Tour: Join the Bottom-Open Float Procession and Float-Gathering! (Includes Yumema Souvenir)
